challenge.title: Korak 40
challenge.description: Kreiraj novi element za div ispod tvog elementa .medium. Jedinstveno svojstvo elementa class mora biti jednako sa daily-value small-text. Unutar ovog novog div, dodaj element za p sa tekstom % Daily Value *, i postavi svojstvo elementa class na bold right.

challengeFiles.name: index
challengeFiles.contents:
Nutrition Facts

8 servings per container

Serving size 2/3 cup (55g)

Amount per serving

Calories

230

challengeFiles.name: styles

tests.text: Treba da kreiraš novi element za div nakon tvog elementa .medium.
Vaš novi element za div mora imati svojstvo elementa class postavljeno na daily-value small-text.
Tvoj novi element div treba da ima element p.
Vaša nova funkcija za p mora da ima tekst % Daily Value *.
Tvoja nova karakteristika p treba da ima svojstvo karakteristike class postavljeno na bold right.

challengeFiles.name: index
challengeFiles.contents:
Nutrition Facts

8 servings per container

Serving size 2/3 cup (55g)

Amount per serving

Calories

230

% Daily Value *

Total Fat 8g 10%

Saturated Fat 1g 5%

Trans Fat 0g

Cholesterol 0mg 0%

Sodium 160mg 7%

Total Carbohydrate 37g 13%

Dietary Fiber 4g

Total Sugars 12g

Includes 10g Added Sugars 20%

Protein 3g

Vitamin D 2mcg 10%

Calcium 260mg 20%

Iron 8mg 45%

Potassium 235mg 6%

* The % Daily Value (DV) tells you how much a nutrient in a serving of food contributes to a daily diet. 2,000 calories a day is used for general nutrition advice.
